title: Materials Engineers
description: Evaluate materials and develop machinery and processes to manufacture materials for use in products that must meet specialized design and performance specifications. Develop new uses for known materials. Includes those engineers working with composite materials or specializing in one type of material, such as graphite, metal and metal alloys, ceramics and glass, plastics and polymers, and naturally occurring materials. Includes metallurgists and metallurgical engineers, ceramic engineers, and welding engineers.

tasks.text: Analyze product failure data and laboratory test results to determine causes of problems and develop solutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and direct the testing or control of processing procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor material performance, and evaluate its deterioration.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct or supervise tests on raw materials or finished products to ensure their quality.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate technical specifications and economic factors relating to process or product design objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Modify properties of metal alloys, using thermal and mechanical treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine appropriate methods for fabricating and joining materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Guide technical staff in developing materials for specific uses in projected products or devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review new product plans, and make recommendations for material selection, based on design objectives such as strength, weight, heat resistance, electrical conductivity, and cost.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise the work of technologists, technicians, and other engineers and scientists.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and implement laboratory operations to develop material and fabrication procedures that meet cost, product specification, and performance standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and evaluate new projects, consulting with other engineers and corporate executives, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise production and testing processes in industrial settings, such as metal refining facilities, smelting or foundry operations, or nonmetallic materials production operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Solve problems in a number of engineering fields, such as mechanical, chemical, electrical, civil, nuclear, and aerospace.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct training sessions on new material products, applications, or manufacturing methods for customers and their employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform managerial functions, such as preparing proposals and budgets, analyzing labor costs, and writing reports.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Present technical information at conferences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Replicate the characteristics of materials and their components, using computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design processing plants and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write for technical magazines, journals, and trade association publications.

tasks.text: Teach in colleges and universities.
